reward.name: Hibiscus Top
reward.description: A top for dancing beneath the stars!

reward.name: Fressia Flower Wrist Flounce
reward.description: This cute and classy bracelet comes to you direct from Spring Valley.

reward.name: Firefly Cuff
reward.description: This great little striped cuff completes the Firefly outfit.

reward.name: Freesia Flower Wrist Flounce
reward.description: This cute and classy bracelet comes to you direct from Spring Valley.

reward.name: Satin Flower Garland
reward.description: This soft satiny accent is perfect for a flight through Spring Valley.

reward.name: Stargazer Pendant
reward.description: Formed out of stargazer petals, this pendant is said to be a lucky charm!

reward.name: Leaf-and-Bloom Necklace
reward.description: Make an elegant entrance wearing this special piece.

reward.name: Freesia Flower Ankle Flounce
reward.description: Fly in style with this spring-inspired accent!

reward.name: Acorn Kettle
reward.description: When it's teatime, this kettle will make any blend delicious!

reward.name: Crocus Bulb Pitcher
reward.description: A hollowed-out flower bulb is perfect for pouring fruit nectars for your guests!

reward.name: Raspberries
reward.description: Juicy and delicious, everyone wants to pick these yummy treats!

reward.name: Daisy Petals
reward.description: Daisies are perfect for playful and fun-loving Fairies and Sparrow Men!

reward.name: Buttercup Petals
reward.description: The golden glow from these petals brightens up any creation!

reward.name: Maple Leaves
reward.description: The most popular leaf in Autumn Forest!

reward.name: Lily Petals
reward.description: Lily Petals add extra cheer to clothing!
